visual_description: In a dimly lit room, two men in light-colored shirts sit at a desk with computers and microphones. The man on the right holds a small green object and looks down at his screen, while the man on the left wears headphones and also focuses on his computer. The camera pans slightly to the right, revealing more of the cluttered workspace and a third man in a dark suit standing in the background.
audio_description: A male voice speaks in Mandarin Chinese, asking a question. The audio is clear and the tone is inquisitive.
